markdown:
#  Resource Tracking And Project Financials Setup Guide 
Table of Contents 
##  Preview the Budget View 
After closing the Configure Columns window, the system returns you to the new budget view's window. Under **Column Configuration** , you can get an idea of how your budget view will look in Procore by selecting a project from the **Preview with Project** drop-down list.
[ ](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/resource-tracking-and-project-financials-setup-guide/customize-the-budget-view-optional/)
[ Assign the Budget View to your Project ](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/resource-tracking-and-project-financials-setup-guide/assign-the-budget-view-to-your-project/)
title: Resource Tracking And Project Financials Setup Guide - Preview the Budget View
description: How to set up your project and budget to leverage Procore's unit-based columns and Resource Tracking tools to track real-time labor costs on a project's budget line items. | Preview the Budget View
